BSC – Barcelona Supercomputing Center
BSC is the largest client in Spain and follows a specific process:
•	All cases must be submitted with an SSR.
•	No CRU parts should be shipped to the customer. All parts must be delivered to the designated Lenovo PUDO.
•	The PUDO is automatically selected for this client:
o	FNX-ESTANC TABACS PEDRALBES
CALLE ALFAMBRA 15 LOCAL
BARCELONA – 08034
•	No need to confirm the address with the customer. All servers are located within the same data center:
•	Plaça d'Eusebi Güell, 1-3 – Barcelona – 08034

Hello Team,
Kindly be informed that Any CDU issue is out of scope for IBM, Premier Support, or other Delivery teams. Vertiv is the CDU manufacturer.

Whenever you have a case for a CDU, please refer client to his Lenovo HPC sales and include Lenovo SDM and then cancel the case. No need to PD with the customer or ask him for
any details related to the CDU.

The information in Glosse LINK refers to CUD support team, however this team is not responding at all and doesn’t provide any support.
https://glosse4lenovo.lenovo.com/wiki/glosse4lenovo/view/Pages/MREF/ThinkSystem/Rack Cabinets/MREF_Neptune_DWC_InRackCoolantDistributionUnit /

Please note that CDU devices are not Lenovo branded. Most of them are Cooltera branded and are covered by a separate support model, which means they should not be handled by Lenovo
ISG support.
Please review the evidence and the handling process below. In case of any discussion, disagreement, or concerns raised by the customer when you share this process,
please involve your local Lenovo Country SDM for alignment and support.

Ceuta & Melilla
•	All CRU and Onsite cases for Ceuta & Melilla are handled by the Spain team.
•	No customs issues are expected for parts shipped from Spain.
•	Melilla has an IBM office available for onsite support.

Eva Schoos has given out a new guideline applicable as of now, that CMOS batteries will no longer (as she stated July last year, see screenshot from her email)
handled as CRU/ONS.New guideline:

• CMOS batteries as CRU only (regardless of warranty or maintenance)
• if customer requests ONS this requires OVD approval by SDM

Gibraltar
•	Cases for Gibraltar are managed by the UKI team. Premier cases are handled by LSPOC.
•	The case must be opened under country: UK, not Spain.
•	No MSD changes are required. The country code and contract type (Standard vs Premier) will automatically route the case to the correct team.
•	No CRU parts for Gibraltar.
•	All parts (including ONS) must be ordered and shipped to the Lenovo ASP address in Málaga. They must not be shipped directly to UKI or Gibraltar.
•	The ASP is responsible for cross-border delivery to Gibraltar.
•	ASP contact details and shipping address will be available in the MSD case. Once “Ship to Customer: No” is selected, the system will populate the correct ASP address in Málaga for onsite coordination.

Update Golden Rules: Low-cost disc* and obvious error policy:
for the avoidance of doubt what a low-cost disc is, the golden rules have been updated accordingly here: https://w3.ibm.com/w3publisher/lenovo-isg/process-documents/ibm-rts-golden-rules
The idea behind was that whenever an issue is obvious, the customer has technical expertise we trust.
we do not expect customer to provide logs but just send the disc, as we have seen complaints at that time when we discussed about the request of logs even though the issue was obvious.

Malta
•	Malta cases are handled by the Spain team to avoid managing an additional queue.
•	Communication and documentation for Malta must be in English, not Spanish.
•	Parts are shipped only to the BP partner in Malta, who is responsible for final delivery to the end user.
Shipping Address:
PHILIP TOLEDO LIMITED
1923, Valletta Road
Marsa, Malta
MRS3000
Contact: Damian Sciberras
Phone: +356 2144 5566

Networking adapters with SFPs - SSR (IBM) MUST RETURN THE SFP
We have created a TIFF message and need get the communication out that the SFP in the adapter needs to be returned.
All of these Adapter FRU parts come with the SFP already installed so the SFP in the “bad” adapter being returned must also be returned to the Reverse Hub:
FRU PN	Description	TIFF Message
03NC419	ThinkSystem QLogic QLE2872 64Gb 2-Port PCIe Fibre Channel Adapter(Generic FW)	The SFP must be returned with the adapter to the Reverse Hub
01KR585	QLogic 16Gb Enhanced  FC Single-port HBA（2690）PCIE	The SFP must be returned with the adapter to the Reverse Hub
01KR586 	QLogic 16Gb Enhanced  FC Dual-port HBA（2692）PCIE	The SFP must be returned with the adapter to the Reverse Hub
00YK541	ThinkSystem QLogic QLE2740 PCIe 32Gb 1-Port SFP+ Fibre Channel Adapter	The SFP must be returned with the adapter to the Reverse Hub
00YK542	ThinkSystem QLogic QLE2742 PCIe 32Gb 2-Port SFP+ Fibre Channel Adapter	The SFP must be returned with the adapter to the Reverse Hub
00YK543	ThinkSystem QLogic QML2692 Mezz 16Gb 2-Port Fibre Channel Adapter	The SFP must be returned with the adapter to the Reverse Hub
01KR590 	ThinkSystem QLogic QLE2770 32Gb 1-Port PCIe Fibre Channel Adapter	The SFP must be returned with the adapter to the Reverse Hub
01KR591 	ThinkSystem QLogic QLE2772 32Gb 2-Port PCIe Fibre Channel Adapter	The SFP must be returned with the adapter to the Reverse Hub

Parts Shipping Guidelines – Regional Handling Overview
Out-of-Hours (OOH) & Weekend Protocol
During OOH or weekends, parts must be shipped directly to the customer’s location, as Lenovo PUDOs are closed.

Repeat Repair Reason Code "Unrelated First Repair" on workorder level:
To minimize the risk of missed situations that are relevant for billing, pls make sure the below is understood and adhered to by all RTS teams.
We have already shared this communication in Q1/2024 however we still do see cases with multiple workorders where the repeat reason code "unrelated first repair"
is selected for second/subsequent workorder.
If that is accidentally wrongly chose, please make sure you select the correct one, if it really is an unrelated repair, make sure you have a second case created.

Parts Sales, Customer asking for parts prices:
Please use the below link to direct the customer to part prices.
https://lenovoisgpartsales.com/

If need help check with Sam.

SAN switches for EMEA are handled by the IBM Storage RTS team, which is separate from Lenovo RTS. They use MSD only for escalation to ATS or part ordering,
while case handling with customer and ONS support are managed through CSP cases under their own OOH process. We will not follow or alert them for such cases.

No CRU for T&M cases -
I know that you are already aware about this process, but it was received from Lenovo SDMs as a kind reminder.
We don’t provide CRU for T&M cases; we only provide FOP & field support only.

Handling of Expired Premier / ThinkAgile Contract Cases – Sherif Thu 2/5/2026 5:55 PM
•	For Premier or ThinkAgile cases where the contract has expired, IBM will inform the customer that the serial number is out of warranty.
•	The customer will be referred to the Lenovo Sales team for contract renewal.
•	IBM will notify the assigned CSM and SDM via email, including the customer name and case number.
•	IBM will not share the Time & Materials (T&M) document.
•	IBM will not wait for customer confirmation and will proceed with case cancellation accordingly.

Lenovo confirmed that IBM should NOT work on any cases for ThinkAgile. Currently, Lenovo route all products with expired warranty/maintenance to IBM and they don’t have a process to automatically route ThinkAgile with expired warranty/maintenance to LSPOC and all other products to IBM. We are asked to notify the people below when this happens. They will create new case manually and will route it to their LSPOC teams/missions, and we have to cancel the original case. I’m in touch with Lenovo on this topic to implement automatic solution.

cmackenzie@lenovo.com
nyanev@lenovo.com
sdurieu1@lenovo.com
astoyanov@lenovo.com
tsmith7@lenovo.com

Although the message below is not related to the countries our team supports, I’d like to use it as a reminder of an important rule.
We are not authorized to handle ThinkAgile or Premier cases under any circumstances, even if:
•	The contract is expired
•	The customer agrees to T&M
•	A Lenovo SDM approves OVD
Any case with a Premier contract (active or expired) must not be handled by our team.
Please ensure strict adherence to this guideline.
